listing.title: Real Estate AI Suite — CRM Follow-Ups, Listings, Deals
listing.shortDescription: 5 AI plugins for real estate agents. Automated follow-up sequences, listing content, deal analysis, open house prep, and client onboarding.
listing.longDescription: The Real Estate AI Suite gives agents and teams a complete AI-powered workflow on top of Claude and Codex. The five plugins cover the full client lifecycle: CRM Follow-Up System generates personalized follow-up sequences and integrates with Follow Up Boss; Listing Content Engine produces MLS-ready descriptions, social captions, and email blasts; Deal Analyzer runs comps and surfaces negotiation insights; Open House Assistant builds scripts, sign-in flows, and post-event follow-ups; and Client Onboarding automates welcome packets and document checklists. Each plugin ships with a system prompt tuned for real estate language and a Codex config for Shopify-compatible delivery.
